case_title: JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC VS. DANTE GAINER

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-20-2017 CONTINUED TO JAN-31-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100032384)

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GAINER, DANTE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-20-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-18-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-27-2017
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-13-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-13-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-31-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
